creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Hi Frederic,

Thank you for taking care about this. Sorry for late answer - I was traveling out of the Internet. 

This PR depends on PR No 192735, which introduces a new port devel/p5-Connector, which you mention. Unfortunately, the latter depends on PR No 192727, as only recent version of textproc/p5-YAML is needed for Connector to operate ok.

All the best, 
Sergei
